author: y4rr
content:
Plan: 4-layer conformance suite per docs/conformance-suites.md.

Layer 1 (Surface inventory): TOML at ferrotorch-llama/tests/conformance/_surface_inventory.toml
  - Enumerate all pub items across attention.rs, config.rs, generation.rs, layer.rs, mlp.rs, model.rs
  - Also gguf_remap, quant_loaders

Layer 2 (Reference fixtures): scripts/regenerate_llama_fixtures.py
  - Uses transformers==4.50.3 (just installed), torch==2.11.0+cu130
  - Tiny 2-layer synthetic Llama config with seed=42 for reproducibility
  - Covers: RMSNorm, RoPE, MLP (SwiGLU), Attention (GQA), DecoderLayer, full LlamaForCausalLM forward
  - NO model downloads - seeded random weights only

Layer 3 (Conformance tests): ferrotorch-llama/tests/conformance_llama.rs
  - Load fixtures/llama.json, assert per-op outputs match reference within tolerance
  - tolerances: RMSNorm/elem 1e-5, Attention 1e-4, full forward 1e-3 (O(n^3) accumulation)
  - cascade_skip with crosslink quick for any divergences found

Layer 4 (Surface gate): ferrotorch-llama/tests/conformance_surface_coverage.rs
  - Read _surface_inventory.toml + _surface_exclusions.toml
  - Scan conformance_llama.rs for references to each item
  - Fail if any item uncovered without exclusion+tracking_issue

Reference: transformers==4.50.3, torch==2.11.0+cu130
Tiny model config: vocab=64, hidden=32, intermediate=64, layers=2, heads=4, kv_heads=2, rope_theta=10000, eps=1e-5
